+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Tracking/InventoryProfileOffsetting.Codeunit.al
@@ -1801,9 +1801,9 @@ codeunit 99000854 "Inventory Profile Offsetting"
             exit(false);
 
         if CheckSourceType then
-            if ((DemandInvtProfile."Source Type" = Database::"Planning Component") and
-                (SupplyInvtProfile."Source Type" = 5406) or // Database::"Prod. Order Line"
-                (DemandInvtProfile."Source Type" = Database::"Requisition Line")) and
+            // Allow planning component demands that stem from an existing production order
+            // to expand the supply; only block when the demand is a requisition line bound order-to-order.

                (DemandInvtProfile.Binding = DemandInvtProfile.Binding::"Order-to-Order")
             then
                 exit(false);

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderDocumentEmailing.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderDocumentEmailing.Codeunit.al
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..56d8006d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderDocumentEmailing.Codeunit.al
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+// ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
+// Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.
+// ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+namespace Microsoft.Sales.Reminder;
+
+codeunit 6763 "Reminder Email Logging"
+{
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", 'OnAfterIsCustomerAccount', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterIsCustomerAccount(DocumentTableId: Integer; var IsCustomer: Boolean)
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            IsCustomer := true;
+    end;
+
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", 'OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName(DocumentTableId: Integer; var FieldName: Text)
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            FieldName := 'Customer No.';
+    end;
+}
